title: ADK-303: Collaborative Multi-Agent Patterns
author: Google Cloud
description: Master consensus protocols, voting nodes, shared blackboards, and sequential editing chains across agent workgroups.

features.title: Blackboards
features.description: Design shared state stores where multiple independent agents read and write variables during calculations.

features.title: Voting Consensus
features.description: Implement consensus checks where worker agents validate each other's outputs before writing to files.

features.title: Sequential Pipelines
features.description: Structure multi-agent pipelines (writer -> reviewer -> publisher) to automate corporate document writing.
